Failed: Test qa08 homepage renders at tablet 768
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa08_homepage_renders_at_tablet_768 2026-06-11 04:36:57 15.02s
What this test was checking
Homepage must render without overflow at tablet 768px width — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Homepage must render without overflow at tablet 768px width.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
